title: The Old Grist Mill
description: Wirt and Gregory meet the Woodsman and learn about the Beast.

title: Hard Times at the Huskin' Bee
description: The brothers visit a town of pumpkin people and participate in a festival.

title: Schooltown Follies
description: They encounter a school attended by animals and a mysterious teacher.

title: Songs of the Dark Lantern
description: The duo gets lost in a tavern filled with singing frogs.

title: Mad Love
description: Wirt tries to impress a girl while Gregory searches for his frog.

title: Lullaby in Frogland
description: The brothers are captured by a frog cult.

title: The Ringing of the Bell
description: They meet Auntie Whispers and a possessed girl named Lorna.

title: Babes in the Wood
description: Wirt and Gregory get lost in a snowstorm and find shelter with a strange family.

title: Into the Unknown
description: A flashback reveals how the brothers ended up in the Unknown.

title: The Unknown
description: The finale where the brothers face the Beast and find their way home.
